Class NetworkSessionsOverviewJSONCreator

java.lang.Object
com.djrapitops.plan.delivery.rendering.json.network.NetworkSessionsOverviewJSONCreator
All Implemented Interfaces:
NetworkTabJSONCreator<Map<String,Object>>, Supplier<Map<String,Object>>
@Singleton @Deprecated(since="2026-04-05 / 5.7 build 3341") public class NetworkSessionsOverviewJSONCreator extends Object implements NetworkTabJSONCreator<Map<String,Object>>
Deprecated.
Use /v1/datapoint instead (types PLAYTIME, AFK_TIME, AFK_TIME_PERCENTAGE).
Creates JSON payload for /network-page Sessions tab.
